notes: This file is committed for auditability. It assists the Master Agent with state between sessions. Updates to project_context.md (SOT-like) or significant memory changes are high-risk and require the Mandatory Review Gate + coordinated Primary SOT updates. Railway ephemeral FS limitations apply (see RAILWAY.md and worker persistence). Phase 1 foundation only - no autonomous loops. Phase 2 first inc (Review Agent 2026-06 Approved with Conditions): added plan_outcomes (minimal append-only log for proposals + plan runs). Full proposal text lives in orchestrator printed output + reviews/ files. Any schema evolution is high-risk. Richer-context inc: 'plan' entries may include tiny 'meta_summary' (bounded excerpt of '## Meta Notes for Future Improvement' only). High-risk; documented; full text stays outside this file. Agent Drift Detection first inc (Review Agent 2026-06 Approved with Conditions, High risk): 'drift_detection' records appended to plan_outcomes (tiny only; high-risk per condition 6). Full drift details in printed output + reviews/2026-06-XX-agent-drift-detection.md. Detector itself subject to the system (condition 10). v2: optional tiny 'summary' on drift records (bounded; high-risk, condition 6). History passed for quality/patterns only (condition 12).
review_agent_2026_06: Created as part of Phase 1 per Review Agent Approved with Conditions (High Risk). Master retains authority. Phase 2 first inc extension: plan_outcomes array added (high-risk, documented). Richer context inc: added meta_summary (tiny) to plan entries (high-risk, condition 6). Drift Detection inc: drift_detection type in plan_outcomes (high-risk minimal; # Review Agent 2026-06). v2: tiny 'summary' on drift records + bounded history in context (high-risk; conditions 6/12).

plan_outcomes.note: See printed proposals above. Requires Review Agent + Master todo_write + handoff before any edit. # Review Agent 2026-06
